goal: Upgrade live verify from artifact-only evidence into a deterministic promotion-sensitive gate while keeping ordinary refactor packages non-blocking when live credentials are unavailable.
successCriteria: Gate results distinguish blocking, held, optional, and unavailable evidence states.
Promotion-sensitive packages fail deterministically when required live evidence is missing.
Ordinary refactor packages remain mergeable without secrets while clearly recording held or unavailable evidence.
explicitlyOutOfScope: Adding brand-new live probes beyond the current validated matrix.
Changing module maturity directly without a separate promotion decision artifact.
